в•ӯв”Җв•®в•ӯв”Җв•®
  в•°в”Җв•Ҝв•°в”Җв•Ҝ  Copilot v1.0.49-1 uses AI.
  в–Ҳ в–ҳв–қ в–Ҳ  Check for mistakes.
   в–”в–”в–”в–”


вқҜ [System] Your terminal identity has been set. widgetId=agent-1ultxz displayName=azure-osprey
  canvasId=storyboard-demo configFile=.storyboard/terminals/agent-1ultxz.json serverUrl=http://localhost:1236 вҖ”
  this is a configuration step, no response needed.


в—Ҹ Configuration acknowledged.


вқҜ Create a component-set for rendering charts of different types based on the prototype, one variant for each type.
   Create the data to render each appropriate chart if necessary


в—Ҹ read terminal config (shell)
  в”Ӯ cat .storyboard/terminals/${STORYBOARD_WIDGET_ID}.json | jq '{canvasId, workingDirectory, connectedWidgets}'
  в”” 2 lines...


в—Ҹ read agent config (shell)
  в”Ӯ cat .storyboard/terminals/agent-1ultxz.json | jq '{canvasId, workingDirectory, connectedWidgets}'
  в”” 22 lines...


в—Ҹ explore prototype (shell)
  в”Ӯ export STORYBOARD_WIDGET_ID=agent-1ultxz; export STORYBOARD_CANVAS_ID=storyboard-demo; export
  в”Ӯ STORYBOARD_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:1236; ls src/prototypes/SiloDashboard/ 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && ls
  в”Ӯ src/components/ 2>/dev/null | head -30
  в”” 1 line...
 ~/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.6.0 [вҺҮ 0.6.0*%]
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
